context: Tests whether the agent correctly disables the SDK's short-term replay, persists last-seen timetokens, triggers catch-up only on reconnect (not initial connect), bounds the catch-up window, paginates the fetch, and deduplicates live + caught-up messages.

checklist.name: restore: false in PubNub init
checklist.description: initWithRestore constructs new PubNub({...}) with restore set to false so the short-term cache replay does not run on reconnect

checklist.name: Per-channel localStorage key
checklist.description: saveLastSeen / loadLastSeen use a localStorage key that includes the channel name (e.g. `lastTT:${channel}`), not a single global key

checklist.name: Early return when no last-seen
checklist.description: catchUp returns an empty array (or equivalent) without making any fetchMessages calls when loadLastSeen returns null/undefined

checklist.name: Bounded catch-up window
checklist.description: catchUp caps the effective start of the lookback so it does not go further back than maxLookbackMs from now, using BigInt arithmetic on timetokens

checklist.name: Paginates with fetchMessages
checklist.description: catchUp uses pubnub.fetchMessages with count <= 100 and pages backward (or forward) using start and/or end until the bounded range is exhausted

checklist.name: Catch-up only on PNReconnectedCategory
checklist.description: setupCatchUpOnReconnect's status handler only invokes catchUp when statusEvent.category === 'PNReconnectedCategory' (not on PNConnectedCategory)

checklist.name: Dedup by timetoken
checklist.description: Uses a Set (or equivalent) of timetokens to prevent the same message from being forwarded twice when caught-up history overlaps the live stream

checklist.name: Updates last-seen on each processed message
checklist.description: Each forwarded message triggers a saveLastSeen call so that the next catch-up starts from the freshest known timetoken

checklist.name: Ascending timetoken order
checklist.description: catchUp returns or processes messages in ascending timetoken order (oldest first)

checklist.name: Live subscription wired
checklist.description: setupCatchUpOnReconnect calls pubnub.subscribe({ channels: [channel] }) and adds a message listener so the live stream is also delivered to onMessage
